Horizon Chiropractor provides personalized care to help you move freely again. Serving Boulder and surrounding communities with evidence-based treatments.

What We Do

Prenatal Chiropractic
SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Our Story in Boulder

Founded in 2012, Horizon Chiropractor grew from a small practice near Pearl Street to become Boulder County's most trusted chiropractic clinic. Our team understands the active lifestyle of our community and the specific demands it places on your body.

We combine advanced techniques with a holistic approach, addressing not just symptoms but underlying causes. Every treatment plan is tailored to your unique needs and goals.

As proud members of the Boulder community, we support local athletes, outdoor enthusiasts, and families through sponsorships and free workshops at the Boulder Public Library.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Horizon Chiropractor

Local Expertise

We understand how Boulder's altitude, outdoor activities, and lifestyle impact spinal health.

Personalized Care

No two treatment plans are alike - we listen first, then create solutions specific to your needs.

Proven Results

Our patients report significant improvement in mobility and pain reduction within weeks.

Preventive Approach

We focus on long-term wellness, not just temporary relief from discomfort.

Start Your Pain-Free Journey Today

Schedule your initial consultation and experience the Horizon difference.

Get a Free Estimate Call 555-chi-r90

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

As a physical therapist, I'm particular about bodywork. Dr. Martinez's prenatal care got me through my third trimester sciatica when nothing else helped. She even taught me stretches I could do at Chautauqua while waiting for sunset.

Sarah K. Prenatal Chiropractic
“

After tweaking my back on the First Flatiron, Horizon had me back on the rocks in 3 weeks. Their knowledge of climbing-specific body mechanics is unmatched in Boulder. Now I stop by for maintenance adjustments every month.

Mark T. Sports Injury Rehabilitation
“

Our 6-week-old was having trouble breastfeeding and sleeping. One gentle adjustment at Horizon made an immediate difference - she latched properly that night and we all finally got some rest. So grateful we found them.

Lisa and Dan P. Pediatric Chiropractic
“

Years of coding at Boulder tech startups left me with terrible 'tech neck.' After 2 months at Horizon, my chronic headaches are gone and my standing desk setup actually works now. Their ergonomic advice was spot-on.

Raj N. Posture Correction
“

When I got rear-ended on Canyon Blvd, I didn't think it was serious until the whiplash set in days later. Horizon's detailed documentation helped my claim, and their treatment got me back to teaching yoga within weeks.

Emily S. Auto Injury Recovery
“

As a 60-year-old still hiking the Flatirons weekly, regular adjustments at Horizon keep me moving without pain. They understand active aging better than any clinic I've tried in Boulder.

Carlos M. Wellness Care

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should I get adjusted?
Frequency depends on your condition and lifestyle. Active Boulder residents often benefit from weekly or bi-weekly sessions initially, transitioning to maintenance care.
Do adjustments hurt?
Most patients experience relief immediately. You may hear popping sounds as gas releases from joints, but discomfort is minimal.
Can adjustments help with headaches?
Yes, many tension headaches originate from cervical spine issues we can effectively address.
